candidates.why: This row is R&D/intangible-related amortisation, not clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and services'. No explicit COGS-specific D&A row appears alongside the selected COGS row, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row is clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating amortisation line above operating profit and appears separate from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Selling, General & Admin', 'Personnel expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). It is R&D-related amortisation rather than a subcomponent visibly nested within those selected rows. Because the dedicated 'Research & Development' row was selected elsewhere and is noted as below operating profit, this explicit amortisation line would not be removed symmetrically by the XRD subtraction, so it should be added separately to XSGA_DA.

This is a broader operating summary line above operating profit, but it mixes depreciation/amortisation with impairment and is not clearly allocable only to XSGA versus COGS. Using it could overstate XSGA_DA and create classification risk.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation, Amortization and Impairment - Balancing value

variables.notes: MANUALLY CHANGED. Selected the explicit R&D-related amortisation row rather than the broader depreciation/amortisation/impairment summary to avoid scope creep and double counting.
